playlist_editor_view.title: Playlist Editor
playlist_editor_view.cycle_error: Cannot save: track "{trackName}" at position {position} creates an infinite loop. Remove or replace this track and try again.
playlist_editor_view.help_body: Here's a breakdown of the different playlist types you can choose from:
playlist_editor_view.help_sequential: Plays tracks in the order they were added. Once the end of the playlist is reached, it stops. If another playlist or a script is sent to the server while a sequential playlist is playing, it will wait until the current playlist finishes before starting.
playlist_editor_view.help_sequentialinterruptible: Similar to Sequential. If a new playlist or script is sent to the server, it will interrupt the current playlist and start the new script or playlist as soon as the current track finishes.
playlist_editor_view.help_sequentialrepeatable: Plays tracks in the order they were added. Once the end of the playlist is reached, it starts over from the beginning. This type is always interruptible.
playlist_editor_view.help_shuffle: Plays tracks in a random order. Each track is played once until all tracks have been played, then it stops. This type is always interruptible.
playlist_editor_view.help_shufflewithrepeat: Similar to Shuffle, but once all tracks have been played, it reshuffles and starts again. This type is always interruptible.
playlist_editor_view.help_shufflewithdelay: Similar to Shuffle, but after each track is played, it waits for a specified delay before playing the next track. This type is always interruptible.
playlist_editor_view.help_shufflewithdelayandrepeat: Similar to Shuffle With Delay, but once all tracks have been played, it reshuffles and starts again. This type is always interruptible.
playlist_editor_view.sequential_nested_warning: Sequential playlists cannot contain nested playlists. {count} track will be removed. | Sequential playlists cannot contain nested playlists. {count} tracks will be removed.

readOnly.title: Read-only mode
readOnly.disabled: This action is disabled while the system is in read-only mode.
readOnly.requestBlocked: The server is in read-only mode. Your change was not saved.

reasonCode.STARTUP_OPEN_FAILED: The database could not be opened at startup. The server is running on a temporary in-memory database with no data.
reasonCode.BACKUP_FAILED: A pre-migration backup could not be written. The schema upgrade was skipped.
reasonCode.MIGRATION_FAILED_NO_BACKUP: A schema migration failed and there was no prior backup to restore from. The database may be in a partially-migrated state.
reasonCode.MIGRATION_FAILED_RESTORED: A schema migration failed but the database was successfully rolled back to the previous version. Investigate the failed migration before redeploying.
reasonCode.MIGRATION_FAILED_RESTORE_FAILED: A schema migration failed and the automatic restore also failed. Manual recovery is required.
reasonCode.UNKNOWN: The database is currently unavailable for writes.
